description: Tesla mobile API: vehicle data, climate, locks, remote start, charging queue, diagnostics, products, and service appointments

env_var_specs.name: TESLA_AUTH_TOKEN
env_var_specs.description: Tesla iOS-app OAuth bearer token (8-hour TTL). Mint via tesla auth login.

tools.name: charging_get_queue
tools.description: Current Supercharger queue position (which stall, ETA). Optional: vin. Returns the queue.

tools.name: diagnostics_get_diagnostics
tools.description: Fetch the authenticated account's vehicle diagnostic feature flags via GET /api/1/diagnostics. No parameters; reads bearer token from the configured auth. Returns the diagnostics object: per-feature config flags Tesla uses to gate diagnostic instrumentation on the user's vehicles. Prefer this when you need to know what diagnostic surfaces the account has enabled; use vehicles_get_data_vehicle_data for per-vehicle live telemetry instead.

tools.name: energy_sites_create_set_backup_reserve
tools.description: Set Powerwall backup reserve percent. Required: site_id, backup_reserve_percent. Returns the new create_set_backup_reserve.

tools.name: energy_sites_create_set_operation
tools.description: Set Powerwall operation mode. Required: site_id, default_real_mode. Returns the new create_set_operation.

tools.name: energy_sites_get_calendar_history
tools.description: Historical energy data per day/month. Required: site_id, kind, period. Returns the get_calendar_history.

tools.name: energy_sites_get_live_status
tools.description: Real-time Powerwall solar/grid/battery power. Required: site_id. Returns the get_live_status.

tools.name: energy_sites_get_rate_tariffs
tools.description: Utility rate plans for Powerwall scheduling. Optional: language. Returns the rate_tariffs.

tools.name: energy_sites_get_site_info
tools.description: Energy site config (capacity, type, address). Required: site_id. Returns the get_site_info.

tools.name: energy_sites_get_site_status
tools.description: Backup-reserve and operation mode. Required: site_id. Returns the get_site_status.

tools.name: logs_create_logs
tools.description: Forward client-side log events (mostly internal use). Required: details. Returns the new logs.

tools.name: notification_preferences_create_notification_preferences
tools.description: Update push notification preferences. Required: app_version, device_token, device_type, locale, notification_preferences, platform. Returns the new notification_preferences.

tools.name: products_get_products
tools.description: List vehicles, Powerwalls, and solar products owned. Optional: orders. Returns the products.

tools.name: users_create_keys
tools.description: Add a virtual phone key or BLE key. Required: battery_level, bluetooth_authorization, bluetooth_enabled, device_token, device_type, kind, locale, location_permissions, low_power_mode, model, name, public_key, tag. Returns the new keys.

tools.name: users_get_app_config
tools.description: Mobile app feature flags and runtime config. Optional: country, page. Returns the app_config.

tools.name: users_get_feature_config
tools.description: Fetch account-level feature gating via GET /api/1/users/feature_config. No parameters; reads bearer token from the configured auth. Returns the feature_config object: the flag bundle Tesla's mobile app uses to decide which UI surfaces and capabilities are available to this account. Useful for detecting whether features like Supercharger Voucher, Premium Connectivity, or new owner workflows are enabled. Distinct from vehicle-level diagnostics (diagnostics_get_diagnostics).

tools.name: users_get_orders
tools.description: Tesla orders (new vehicle deliveries, accessory purchases). Optional: device_country, device_language, ttp_locale. Returns the orders.

tools.name: vehicles_create_actuate_trunk
tools.description: Open/close trunk or frunk; which_trunk = front | rear. Required: vehicle_id, which_trunk. Returns the new create_actuate_trunk.

tools.name: vehicles_create_add_charge_schedule
tools.description: Add a charging schedule (location + time window). Required: vehicle_id, lat, lon. Optional: start_enabled, end_enabled, start_time (plus 3 more). Returns the new create_add_charge_schedule.

tools.name: vehicles_create_add_precondition_schedule
tools.description: Add a preconditioning schedule. Required: vehicle_id, lat, lon, precondition_time. Optional: days_of_week, enabled. Returns the new create_add_precondition_schedule.

params.name: precondition_time
params.description: Minutes from midnight to be ready

tools.name: vehicles_create_adjust_volume
tools.description: Set volume to specific level. Required: vehicle_id, volume. Returns the new create_adjust_volume.

tools.name: vehicles_create_auto_conditioning_start
tools.description: POST /api/1/vehicles/{vehicle_id}/command/auto_conditioning_start. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new auto_conditioning_start.

params.name: vehicle_id
params.description: Vehicle id from /api/1/products (the integer id field, NOT the VIN)

tools.name: vehicles_create_auto_conditioning_stop
tools.description: POST /api/1/vehicles/{vehicle_id}/command/auto_conditioning_stop. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new auto_conditioning_stop.

params.name: vehicle_id
params.description: Vehicle id from /api/1/products (the integer id field, NOT the VIN)

tools.name: vehicles_create_bioweapon_mode
tools.description: Toggle bioweapon defense mode (HEPA recirculation). Required: vehicle_id, on. Optional: manual_override. Returns the new create_bioweapon_mode.

tools.name: vehicles_create_cancel_software_update
tools.description: Cancel pending software update. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_cancel_software_update.

tools.name: vehicles_create_charge_max_range
tools.description: Set charge limit to Max Range (100%). Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_charge_max_range.

tools.name: vehicles_create_charge_port_door_close
tools.description: Close the charge port. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_charge_port_door_close.

tools.name: vehicles_create_charge_port_door_open
tools.description: Open the charge port. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_charge_port_door_open.

tools.name: vehicles_create_charge_standard
tools.description: Set charge limit to Standard (~90%). Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_charge_standard.

tools.name: vehicles_create_charge_start
tools.description: Start charging. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_charge_start.

tools.name: vehicles_create_charge_stop
tools.description: Stop charging. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_charge_stop.

tools.name: vehicles_create_climate_keeper_mode
tools.description: Climate keeper mode: 0=off, 1=on, 2=dog, 3=camp. Required: vehicle_id, climate_keeper_mode. Returns the new create_climate_keeper_mode.

tools.name: vehicles_create_door_lock
tools.description: POST /api/1/vehicles/{vehicle_id}/command/door_lock. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new door_lock.

params.name: vehicle_id
params.description: Vehicle id from /api/1/products (the integer id field, NOT the VIN)

tools.name: vehicles_create_door_unlock
tools.description: POST /api/1/vehicles/{vehicle_id}/command/door_unlock. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new door_unlock.

params.name: vehicle_id
params.description: Vehicle id from /api/1/products (the integer id field, NOT the VIN)

tools.name: vehicles_create_erase_user_data
tools.description: Erase guest-session user data. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_erase_user_data.

tools.name: vehicles_create_flash_lights
tools.description: Flash headlights. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_flash_lights.

tools.name: vehicles_create_guest_mode
tools.description: Enable/disable Guest mode. Required: vehicle_id, enable. Returns the new create_guest_mode.

tools.name: vehicles_create_hermes
tools.description: POST /api/1/vehicles/{vehicle_id}/jwt/hermes. Required: vehicle_id, uuid. Returns the new hermes.

params.name: vehicle_id
params.description: Vehicle id from /api/1/products (the integer id field, NOT the VIN)

tools.name: vehicles_create_honk_horn
tools.description: Honk the horn. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_honk_horn.

tools.name: vehicles_create_max_defrost
tools.description: Toggle max defrost. Required: vehicle_id, on. Returns the new create_max_defrost.

tools.name: vehicles_create_media_next_favorite
tools.description: Next favorite station. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_media_next_favorite.

tools.name: vehicles_create_media_next_track
tools.description: Next track. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_media_next_track.

tools.name: vehicles_create_media_prev_favorite
tools.description: Previous favorite station. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_media_prev_favorite.

tools.name: vehicles_create_media_prev_track
tools.description: Previous track. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_media_prev_track.

tools.name: vehicles_create_media_toggle_playback
tools.description: Toggle play/pause. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_media_toggle_playback.

tools.name: vehicles_create_media_volume_down
tools.description: Volume down. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_media_volume_down.

tools.name: vehicles_create_media_volume_up
tools.description: Volume up. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_media_volume_up.

tools.name: vehicles_create_navigation_gps_request
tools.description: Send lat/lng directly to navigation. Required: vehicle_id, lat, lon. Optional: order. Returns the new create_navigation_gps_request.

tools.name: vehicles_create_remote_start_drive
tools.description: POST /api/1/vehicles/{vehicle_id}/command/remote_start_drive. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new remote_start_drive.

params.name: vehicle_id
params.description: Vehicle id from /api/1/products (the integer id field, NOT the VIN)

tools.name: vehicles_create_remove_charge_schedule
tools.description: Remove charging schedule by id. Required: vehicle_id, id. Returns the new create_remove_charge_schedule.

tools.name: vehicles_create_remove_precondition_schedule
tools.description: Remove preconditioning schedule by id. Required: vehicle_id, id. Returns the new create_remove_precondition_schedule.

tools.name: vehicles_create_reset_valet_pin
tools.description: Reset Valet PIN. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_reset_valet_pin.

tools.name: vehicles_create_schedule_software_update
tools.description: Schedule the pending software update. Required: vehicle_id, offset_sec. Returns the new create_schedule_software_update.

tools.name: vehicles_create_seat_heater_request
tools.description: Set seat heater level (0-3) at a seat position (0=driver, 1=passenger, 2-5=rear). Required: vehicle_id, heater, level. Returns the new create_seat_heater_request.

tools.name: vehicles_create_set_charge_limit
tools.description: Set charge limit percent (50-100). Required: vehicle_id, percent. Returns the new create_set_charge_limit.

tools.name: vehicles_create_set_charging_amps
tools.description: Set charging amps draw. Required: vehicle_id, charging_amps. Returns the new create_set_charging_amps.

tools.name: vehicles_create_set_sentry_mode
tools.description: Enable/disable Sentry mode. Required: vehicle_id, on. Returns the new create_set_sentry_mode.

tools.name: vehicles_create_set_temps
tools.description: Set driver and passenger climate temps (Celsius). Required: vehicle_id, driver_temp, passenger_temp. Returns the new create_set_temps.

tools.name: vehicles_create_set_valet_mode
tools.description: Enable/disable Valet mode with optional PIN. Required: vehicle_id, on. Optional: password. Returns the new create_set_valet_mode.

tools.name: vehicles_create_share
tools.description: Send navigation destination to the car (address or coordinates). Required: vehicle_id, value. Optional: type, locale, timestamp_ms. Returns the new create_share.

params.name: value
params.description: Object containing destination text or coords

tools.name: vehicles_create_speed_limit_activate
tools.description: Activate Speed Limit mode. Required: vehicle_id, pin. Returns the new create_speed_limit_activate.

tools.name: vehicles_create_speed_limit_clear_pin
tools.description: Clear Speed Limit PIN. Required: vehicle_id, pin. Returns the new create_speed_limit_clear_pin.

tools.name: vehicles_create_speed_limit_deactivate
tools.description: Deactivate Speed Limit mode. Required: vehicle_id, pin. Returns the new create_speed_limit_deactivate.

tools.name: vehicles_create_speed_limit_set_limit
tools.description: Set Speed Limit value (mph). Required: vehicle_id, limit_mph. Returns the new create_speed_limit_set_limit.

tools.name: vehicles_create_steering_wheel_heater_request
tools.description: Toggle steering wheel heater. Required: vehicle_id, on. Returns the new create_steering_wheel_heater_request.

tools.name: vehicles_create_sun_roof_control
tools.description: Sun roof: state = vent | close. Required: vehicle_id, state. Returns the new create_sun_roof_control.

tools.name: vehicles_create_trigger_homelink
tools.description: Trigger HomeLink garage door. Required: vehicle_id, lat, lon. Returns the new create_trigger_homelink.

tools.name: vehicles_create_wake_up
tools.description: Wake the vehicle from sleep. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the new create_wake_up.

tools.name: vehicles_create_window_control
tools.description: Vent or close all windows; command = vent | close. Required: vehicle_id, command. Optional: lat, lon. Returns the new create_window_control.

tools.name: vehicles_get_compose_image
tools.description: Compose a rendered image of the configured vehicle. Required: vehicle_id. Optional: view, options, size. Returns the get_compose_image.

tools.name: vehicles_get_data_charge_state
tools.description: Charge state subset (faster than full vehicle_data). Required: vehicle_id. Returns the get_data_charge_state.

tools.name: vehicles_get_data_climate_state
tools.description: Climate state subset. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the get_data_climate_state.

tools.name: vehicles_get_data_drive_state
tools.description: Drive state (location, speed, shift) subset. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the get_data_drive_state.

tools.name: vehicles_get_data_gui_settings
tools.description: GUI settings (units, time format). Required: vehicle_id. Returns the get_data_gui_settings.

tools.name: vehicles_get_data_vehicle_config
tools.description: Vehicle config (model, options, trim). Required: vehicle_id. Returns the get_data_vehicle_config.

tools.name: vehicles_get_data_vehicle_state
tools.description: Vehicle state (locks, software, sentry) subset. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the get_data_vehicle_state.

tools.name: vehicles_get_mobile_enabled
tools.description: Is mobile control enabled in the car. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the get_mobile_enabled.

tools.name: vehicles_get_nearby_chargers
tools.description: Nearby Supercharger sites with stall availability subfield. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the get_nearby_chargers.

tools.name: vehicles_get_release_notes
tools.description: Release notes for the current/queued software update. Required: vehicle_id. Returns the get_release_notes.

tools.name: vehicles_get_service_data
tools.description: Open service appointments and recent service history for this vehicle. Required: vehicle_id. Optional: version. Returns the service_data.

params.name: vehicle_id
params.description: Vehicle id from /api/1/products (the integer id field, NOT the VIN)

tools.name: vehicles_get_vehicle_data
tools.description: Full vehicle state snapshot: charge, climate, drive, GUI, vehicle config, and software. Required: vehicle_id. Optional: endpoints. Returns the vehicle_data.

params.name: vehicle_id
params.description: Vehicle id from /api/1/products (the integer id field, NOT the VIN)
